title: IRR: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company is analyzing a proposed...
summary: Calculate the internal rate of return by finding the discount rate that sets NPV to zero.
prompt: The Majestic Mulch and Compost Company is analyzing a proposed project with an initial cost of $50,000 and estimated cash flows of $15,000 per year for 5 years. What is the project’s IRR?

options.text: The IRR is the rate that makes NPV = 0

solution: The IRR is the rate that makes NPV = 0. When calculated, it is approximately 15%.
